items.md: to Dana Gabbard; to David Gerstein; to Peter Kylling; to All Star Auctions; to Ellen D. Goldlust-Gingrich; and last but not least to my wife, Robin, for putting up with an author who was as obsessive in his scholarship as Uncle Scrooge in hoarding wealth.
